displayNameZh: 我们开始！能量爆发动画
summary: Yt Audio Lets Start component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「我们开始！能量爆发动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-audio-lets-start/src/YtAudioLetsStart.tsx` and `remotion/yt-audio-lets-start/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtAudioLetsStart` and `ytAudioLetsStartDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Audio Lets Start Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-audio-lets-start to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtAudioLetsStartProps API and register the YtAudioLetsStart composition with the default props.
